name: EXECUTION: yaar main nahin bol rahi.

logs.message: [SYSTEM] Task "EXECUTION: yaar main nahin bol rahi." initialized.

result.reply:
Arre, chill yaar. 😌 System ko emotional takkar nahi aati, hum toh logic pe chalte hain.

Dekho, main yahan *orchestrate* karne ke liye hoon, koi personal conversation karne ke liye nahi. Mera kaam hai OpenClaw ko run rakhna, aur uske liye mujhe clear instructions chahiye.

Agar aapko **DM_Monitor_Pro** agent ke baare mein koi specific sawaal hai (jaise ki usko pause karna hai, ya uske settings change karne hain), toh mujhe batao.

Ya phir, agar aapka koi *naya* task hai—koi research, koi post karna hai, ya koi aur agent setup karna hai—toh woh batao.

Hum baat ko *task-oriented* rakhte hain, okay? 😉 Kya plan hai abhi?
